Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Bel Calem]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Bel Calem is the place Leah came from.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Bel Calem is a location Leah commands Yakir to take her to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 3''' — Bel Calem is the Overlord's seat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Bel Calem is a location mentioned by Cormac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — Leah spent a few weeks in Bel Calem.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — The Myrians are headed for Bel Calem.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Bel Calem is a destination Alin wishes to reach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Bel Calem is a city with stone walls approximately twelve feet tall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Bel Calem is a city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — Bel Calem is a city where the houses are made of pale brick, wood, stone, or precious metals.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Bel Calem is the home of Adrienne Lamarkis Daiasus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Bel Calem is a location reachable through Naraka.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Kai had business in Bel Calem.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Bel Calem is a four day's journey from Enosh over land.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Ash from the Incarnation's destruction could be scattered to Bel Calem.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Bel Calem was torn to pieces by the Naraka Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 5''' — Bel Calem is a location where Malachi has an office.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Bel Calem is a kingdom/place comparable to Myria.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
